flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hampshire College fell 95% between 2021 and 2024 (53.0% → 2.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hampshire College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (62.4% → 54.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hampshire College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.7k → $58.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hampshire College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.7k → $58.9k).
